title: Improving adherence
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Health — interventions to improve treatment adherence and compliance.
learningObjectives: Explain patient education and simplified regimens.
Analyse reminder systems and social support.
Evaluate motivational interviewing and CBT for adherence.

simpleExplanation.title: Getting patients to stick with treatment
simpleExplanation.summary: Better communication, simpler dosing, reminders, and addressing beliefs about illness all improve the chances patients follow through.
steps: Address fears — discuss side effects openly.

sections.content: **Improving adherence** (3.2.3) completes 3.2. Propose **multi-component interventions** in essays.
